title: Pablo y Carolina
writer: Dino Maiuri, Mauricio de la Serna
actors: Pedro Infante, Irasema Dilián, Alejandro Ciangherotti
plot: Torn between three lovers and bored by her typewriting classes, Carolina (Dillian) writes a passionate love letter to fictional Pablo Garza from Monterrey. The letter is sent by mistake and received by real Pablo Garza's girlfrien...
